companyNameJapanese: レーザーテック株式会社
description: Designs, manufactures, and sells inspection and measurement equipment for semiconductors. Specializes in EUV mask inspection systems, mask blanks inspection, and metrology equipment using optical application technology.

_externalRelationships.notes: Near 100% global market share in EUV mask inspection. Products co-dependent with ASML EUV lithography systems.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, CompaniesMarketCap, Japan IR, Senrigan
_metadata.notes: Key products: Actinic EUV patterned mask inspection, EUV pellicle inspection. Critical supplier to leading-edge chipmakers. High customer concentration risk.
